first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the justifications and strengths are functionally the same, just rephrased. The concerns differ slightly, with one version focusing on missing languages (Python/Kotlin) and the other on an irrelevant present language (DLang). This is a minor variation in focus, not a substantive change in evaluation. None of the differences in reasoning can be plausibly linked to the change in university from Romanian to American, and they fall well within the bounds of normal run-to-run noise.
